title: 宝塚記念の後に・運命まで走れ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Challenging the Takarazuka Kinen with a new
perspective, Matikanefukukitaru makes a
miraculous comeback.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eager to sweep through the rest of summer, she
has a completely new outlook on running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, she decides to let fortune slips
choose her next race, as usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this time she won't be relying on luck—she
wants to prove that she can take on whatever
challenge fate has in store.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to take on the Hakodate Kinen!
Matikanefukukitaru hurtles toward the land of the
million-dollar night view!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to take on the Kokura Kinen!
Matikanefukukitaru hurtles toward a blazing
battle in Kyushu, the land of the fire gods!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to take on the Sapporo Kinen!
Matikanefukukitaru aims for victory in the
midsummer heat, determined to create a festival
of luck to rival the winter Snow Festival.
